summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) No bats tests provided—task requires all tests runnable with `bats`, passing end-to-end. (2) No TDD evidence—task mandates failing test FIRST, then code; script appears written without tests. (3) No test fixtures—workflow references nonexistent tests/fixtures/basic.tsv and tests/policy.env. (4) No actionlint validation, no act execution, no act-result.txt—all required. (5) Script untested against shellcheck. Workflow incomplete skeleton cannot verify functionality. While cleanup.sh has decent arg parsing, error handling, and comments, the entire delivery is non-functional per requirements.
